speaker: charlie
text: Before we wrap up today's bulletin, I want to highlight our story of the day - the Goldman Environmental Prize winners. This year's recipients include heroes like Yuvelis Morales Blanco from Colombia, whose tireless campaigning successfully halted commercial fracking across the entire country.

speaker: alice
text: Stories like that remind you that ordinary people really can achieve extraordinary things when they put their minds to it. Whether it's protecting sea turtles, developing breakthrough treatments, or standing up to big oil companies, people are making a real difference.

speaker: charlie
text: Exactly right Jamie. And that's what ParkSyde Bright Side is all about - celebrating the good news, the positive changes, and the people working hard to make our world a better place.

speaker: alice
text: From all of us here at ParkSyde, thanks for joining us for today's bulletin. Remember, good things are happening all around us - sometimes we just need to look for them.

speaker: charlie
text: Have a fantastic Friday everyone, and we'll catch you next time with more of the good stuff. Until then, stay positive and keep spreading the good vibes. This is Alex Mercer and Jamie signing off from ParkSyde Bright Side.
